objective: Compute one deterministic issuer-level point-in-time price-to-sales observation from the accepted S4 binding without activating a factor or strategy.
claim_ceiling: E0 isolated issuer P/S kernel and negative validation only; no approved product semantics, stable handoff, factor activation, tier, strategy, replay, or release-readiness claim

requirements: queued S5 registration is merged to main
the implementation PR pins its exact current main base SHA
the frozen corpus path and SHA-256 are committed before execution
an independent reviewer is assigned before E0 acceptance
issue #161 contains the exact manifest path and SHA-256

dependencies.artifact: accepted issuer P/S and strategy candidate identity contract
approved Core Strategy semantic values and TOPT mapping

required_strata: one issuer with two security share classes and two price listings
complete market-cap aggregation with PIT price, shares, revenue, and FX
missing, future, stale, wrong-identity, unit, currency, and duplicate-component rejection
canonical reorder and deterministic semantic identity

release_activation.reason: S5 is an isolated provisional factor kernel; #59/#21 approval and #25 candidate acceptance remain mandatory

negative_controls: binding, candidate-universe, or P/S policy identity mismatch
future-known, stale, unavailable, or wrong-subject observation
missing FX or invalid unit and currency
nonpositive revenue or vendor precomputed P/S
reordered inputs and attempted release activation

invalidation: P/S contract, corpus, or kernel output change creates a new batch revision
shared-path need blocks the batch until an explicit integration lease exists
product approval or a real TOPT mapping does not raise this provisional evidence ceiling
rollback: Revert the isolated S5 batch paths and evidence together; no accepted release manifest or runtime registry may reference this provisional kernel.
